stages.goal: Find trace evidence that service order responds to queue priority.
stages.theory_detail: MLFQ prioritizes higher queues and adjusts placement as jobs consume CPU.

hints.concept: MLFQ behavior depends on observed CPU usage, not static labels.
hints.explicit: Run until you can identify at least two queue-influenced dispatch choices.

stages.objective: Validate MLFQ behavior while preserving full completion.
stages.goal: Pass trace and completion checks for MLFQ stage.

hints.concept: Adaptive priority is useful only if all work still progresses.
hints.explicit: Continue run until both jobs complete, then submit.

stages.objective: Apply tuning and compare cadence with prior MLFQ stages.
stages.goal: Adjust policy settings within limits and keep checks green.

hints.concept: Controlled tuning reveals policy sensitivity without breaking invariants.
hints.explicit: Apply update, rerun workload, and verify completion plus trace requirements.
